description: Style NoteGuys who take their sneaker’s looks seriously will look seriously cool in this trendy, two-tone logoed lace-up from puma. Constructed with super-lightweight leather and nylon, the California NM features a perforated upper for breathability and extra cushioning at the collar, tongue and footbed for comfort and support throughout the day.Product DetailsUpper is a combination of soft leather and sporty textile with a logo on the eyestay tab to give it a polished varsity appealDetailed perforation pattern on the toePU rubber midsole provides added shock absorbencyRubber outsole lends excellent traction indoors and outMaterial and CareLeather and textileRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
